text: Passion without boundaries will lead you to burnout
The greatest project you’ll ever work on is yourself
Belief in yourself is overrated, generate evidence
Slow motion is better than no motion
If humans were to exitinct the sun would stil shine and the earth would still rotate but the universe would loose one of it’s greatest autobiographers
We don’t have forever, all we have is a single day
If the user is confused, the design is at fault
Design isn’t done when the user gets it right; it’s done when they can’t get it wrong
